millet.name: Millet (Gero)
millet.tips: Highly drought tolerant. Plant early in June. Ideal for most parts of Katsina.

sorghum.name: Sorghum (Dawa)
sorghum.tips: Excellent for dry zones. Use improved varieties like Samsorg-14 or KSV-8.

groundnut.name: Groundnut (Gyada)
groundnut.tips: Plant in rows. Avoid waterlogging. Harvest between 90-110 days.

cowpea.name: Cowpea (Wake)
cowpea.tips: Nitrogen-fixing crop. Excellent for intercropping with millet or sorghum.
cowpea.pests: Maruca pod borer, Aphids, Flower thrips

maize.name: Maize (Masara)
maize.tips: Needs good rainfall and timely fertilizer application.

cotton.name: Cotton
cotton.tips: Katsina is one of Nigeria's largest producers.

sesame.name: Sesame (Benne)
sesame.tips: High value cash crop. Very drought tolerant.

tomato.name: Tomato
tomato.season: June - September and Dry season with irrigation
tomato.soil: Fertile loamy soil, rich in organic matter
tomato.tips: Major vegetable crop in Katsina. Needs staking and regular watering.
tomato.pests: Tuta absoluta (fruit borer), Aphids, Bacterial wilt

onion.name: Onion
onion.tips: Very profitable cash crop. Katsina produces large quantities.
onion.pests: Thrips, Onion fly, Purple blotch disease

pepper.name: Pepper
pepper.tips: High demand vegetable. Can be intercropped.

soybean.name: Soybean
soybean.tips: Growing fast due to high demand for oil and protein.
